label: Interhour of the Ninth Hour
description: The Interhour of the Ninth Hour (Mezhduchasiye) is a brief interstitial office appended to the Ninth Hour in monastic practice. It consists of three psalms, the Trisagion, a troparion of the day, and a Theotokion proper to this hour.

sections.label: Fixed Psalmody
sections.notes: The Interhour of the Ninth Hour appoints Psalms 86, 87, and 88 (LXX).

items.label: Psalm 86 (LXX) — His foundations are in the holy mountains
Psalm 87 (LXX) — O Lord God of my salvation
Psalm 88 (LXX) — I will sing of Thy mercies, O Lord

sections.label: Troparia
sections.notes: The troparion of the day followed by the Theotokion of the Interhour of the Ninth Hour.

items.label: Troparion of the Day
items.note: Variable troparion: resolved via Menaion resolver or weekday-theme rubric by HorologionEngine.

items.label: Theotokion of the Interhour of the Ninth Hour
Dismissal
items.text:
Through the prayers of our holy fathers, Lord Jesus Christ our God, have mercy on us and save us.
Amen.
